question.label: Week three check-in
question.name: What's been most on your mind at work lately, Sam?
question.description: Safe opener that lets Sam set the context before any friction is raised.

answer: I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.

assessment.note: He can execute tasks but is second-guessing whether his approach matches team expectations, which signals mild uncertainty and strain around fit.

new_queue.label: Team expectations
new_queue.name: When you second-guess your approach, what expectations feel hardest to read?

new_queue.label: Done means what
new_queue.name: What does 'done' mean to you on the tickets you've picked up so far?

new_queue.label: Unclear handoffs
new_queue.name: Where are the handoffs still fuzzy for you?

new_queue.label: Ship-time hesitation
new_queue.name: What tends to make shipping feel risky right before you send it?

new_queue.label: Tooling friction
new_queue.name: What part of your workflow is slowing you down most right now?

new_queue.label: Go-to people
new_queue.name: Who do you already feel comfortable going to when you get stuck?

new_queue.label: Next-step focus
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what would you want to tighten up first?

history.answer_excerpt: I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
